description: Oxley Bridge Acquisition Limited does not have significant operations. It intends to effect a merger, amalgamation, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization, or similar business combination with one or more businesses in the consumer and technology sectors. The company was incorporated in 2024 and is based in Vancouver, Canada.
